text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rain pours from the sky, pounding heavily against the windows.
According to the forecast, it should clear up in the afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Trainer! It's rainin' cats and dogs out there—and on a training
day, no less!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: On that note, I've got a favor to ask!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me she wants to run in this downpour? She'll catch a
cold!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Let's make sunshine dolls together!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My classmates were talking about how much they wanted to run
outside earlier.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They were all so disappointed; it was like the gloom from the storm
had seeped right into the classroom.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's when it hit me—why not make a sunshine doll? A super big one!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If it's super big, it'll be super powerful too, right? Not even a
hurricane will stand a chance!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So hand me that curtain over there, Trainer!
choice_data_list: We're making it out of a curtain?!
We're making it out of a curtain?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Just you wait—I'll bring the sun out of hidin' with the
most powerful sunshine doll you've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure this will bring a happy smile to everyones' faces! So come on,
let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's great that Taiki's thinking about her friends, she's trying to
turn the school curtains into sunshine dolls!
choice_data_list: L-let's use an even bigger cloth!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wh-what? Bigger than a curtain?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We request some old bed sheets from the nurse's office and sew them
together into a single large cloth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And after a bit of refashioning...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now all that's left is to hang it in the window! So cheer up, Trainer!
You've got this!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whew! Hanging up such a big sunshine doll is back-breaking work.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: But it sure turned out great! The cute smile on its face is the best part!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A life-size sunshine doll sways in the window, making the room feel
like something out of a haunted house.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeehaaaw! Okay, lookin' good! This bad boy'll blow the rain clouds
away for sure—oh!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! The sun's coming out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I peer out the window to see that the rain has stopped and the sun is
beginning to peek through the clouds.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Just goes to show what a true Japanese magic item and our
power can do, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Taiki gazing happily up at the sky, I decide not to tell her
about the weather forecast.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's some perfect training weather! Now everyone can run at full
power!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'm gonna go take a gander at everybody's smiling faces!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oblivious to me calling her name, Taiki bolts off with a skip in her
step.
